hero.title: Discover the World Like Never Before
hero.copy: Explore every country through data, culture, weather, maps, stories, and a personal travel wishlist.

explore.title: Filter the entire planet in seconds
explore.copy: Search by country, capital, continent, language, currency, or population scale.
explore.emptyCopy: Try a different combination of filters.

compare.title: Two nations, one clean view
compare.copy: Choose any two countries and compare their key profile data side by side.

wishlistPage.title: Your personal world map
wishlistPage.copy: Save destinations, mark places visited, and keep the journey moving.
wishlistPage.emptyCopy: Start saving countries from Explore or Country Details.
wishlistPage.clearCopy: This removes every saved country from your local wishlist.

favoritesPage.title: Your saved highlights
favoritesPage.copy: Keep countries you want to revisit quickly while your wishlist stays focused on future travel plans.
favoritesPage.emptyCopy: Tap the heart on any country card to save it here.

welcome.title: Welcome to EarthLens
welcome.copy: Explore countries, compare nations, save dream destinations, and switch themes or languages anytime.

details.unavailable: Country details are unavailable right now.

featured.title: Places that make the map feel alive.

facts.title: Small details, global scale.
items: More than 190 sovereign states are recognized around the world.
Asia is home to most of the world's population.
Canada has the longest coastline of any country.
The Pacific Ocean is larger than all of Earth's land combined.
More than 7,000 languages are spoken worldwide.

why.title: A richer way to browse the planet.
why.exploreCopy: Search, filter, and open quick views without losing your place.
why.compareCopy: See population, area, currencies, and languages side by side.
why.rememberCopy: Favorites and wishlist remain saved on your device.

testimonials: EarthLens makes researching a new destination clear, fast, and enjoyable.
A beautiful way to discover countries I had never considered visiting.

aboutPage.title: A smarter way to understand places before you go
aboutPage.copy: EarthLens helps travelers, students, families, and curious explorers compare countries, discover essential facts, understand local context, and keep track of destinations that matter to them.

cards.title: Plan with clarity
cards.copy: Search countries by region, language, currency, population, and travel relevance.

cards.title: Compare confidently
cards.copy: Place two countries side by side to understand scale, capitals, timezones, and cultural context.

cards.title: Remember your world
cards.copy: Save dream destinations, mark visited places, and build a personal travel wishlist.

steps: Choose a destination with better context
Compare countries before studying, moving, or traveling
Save places that match your goals
Return anytime to continue your world list
aboutPage.privacyCopy: Your favorites and wishlist stay on your device. EarthLens is designed to be fast, calm, and helpful from the first visit.

notFound.title: This route drifted off the map.
notFound.copy: The page you are looking for is not in our atlas, but the rest of the world is still waiting.

footer.tagline: Discover the World Like Never Before.

offline: You are offline. Saved preferences still work.
